name: Saline na al'ada (0.9% NaCl)
description: Isotonic crystalloid ruwa. Ana amfani da shi don farfado da ruwa na IV. A cikin gigin jini, yi amfani da hankali -- manyan ɗimbin yawa suna ƙara tsananta coagulopathy (hyperchloremic acidosis, dilutional coagulopathy). An fi son hauhawar jini mai izini a cikin shiga cikin rauni yayin da ake kula da zubar jini.
indications: Farfadowar ruwa (tare da taka tsantsan a cikin girgizar hemorrhagic)
Hypovolemia daga abubuwan da ba na jini ba
dose: Girgizar jini: Iyakance zuwa 1L max mai jiran gadon kula da zubar jini (halallen hanta). Maƙasudin SBP 80-90 mmHg a cikin rauni mai shiga, 90 mmHg a cikin TBI. Marasa jini hypovolemia: 500 ml boluses, sake tantancewa.
contraindications: Yawan ruwa mai yawa / edema na huhu (dangi)
warnings: Babban kundin yana haifar da hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis da dilutional coagulopathy -- yana kara muni mai kisa a cikin rauni.
An fi son Lactated Ringer's (LR) don farfado da rauni mai girma.
KAR a sake farfado da raunin raunin da ya wuce-wuri kafin maganin zubar jini na tiyata (haɓaka hawan jini).

pediatric.dose: 20 ml/kg IV bolus, sake tantancewa. Maimaita max x3 (60 ml/kg jimlar) kafin yin la'akari da samfuran jini.

obstetric.note: Daidaitaccen farfadowa a cikin zubar da jini na haihuwa. Farfaɗowar ruwa mai ƙarfi wanda ya dace da zubar jini na haihuwa kafin samun samfuran jini.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
